summary: Iteration 16 - End-to-end testing of Risk/Issue lifecycle, ProjectStatusCheckin UX changes (progress slider removed, inline risk adder added), blocker auto-promotion with dedup, and two new AI actions (create_status_update, update_risk). 13/13 backend pytest cases pass. Frontend UI flows verified: Risks tab CRUD, Add Risk dialog, status update dialog content correctness.
passed_tests: POST /api/projects/{id}/risks — creates with mitigation, status, category (200)
DELETE /api/risks/{id} — removes risk; subsequent PUT returns 404
POST /api/status-updates without actual_progress — succeeds; defaults to project value
Blocker text auto-promoted to Issue (category=Issue, status=Active) after status update
Same blocker submitted twice → dedup verified (only 1 risk in register)
new_risks inline array on status-update payload creates risks with given fields
execute-action add_risk with mitigation/status/category persists all fields
execute-action update_risk with status change (→Closed) persists
execute-action create_status_update — creates SU + auto-promotes blockers; returns issues_created count
AI chat endpoint responds when queried about blockers (no 500s)
UI: ProjectDetail Risks tab shows 'Risk & Issue Register' title with 'Add Risk / Issue' button
UI: Risk dialog opens with Description, Type (Risk/Issue), Status (Active/Mitigated/Accepted/Closed), Impact, Probability, Mitigation fields
UI: Status update dialog has NO 'Actual Progress' label and NO slider elements
UI: Inline 'Raise a Risk / Issue' section with desc/category/impact/probability/mitigation inputs and add button
UI: Blockers input has helper text indicating auto-promotion to Issue
UI: 16 projects listed in Project Status Check-in card (expand/collapse works)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 1905: blockers are split ONLY on comma, not newline — inconsistent with the auto-promotion logic which uses re.split(r'[,\n]+'). So a multi-line blockers input stores as single-item list in status_doc but produces multiple issues. Minor cosmetic inconsistency — consider unifying to split on both.
server.py still >6000 lines — continues to grow; should be split into modules (risks, status_updates, ai_actions, auth) for maintainability.

create_status_update action in execute-action does NOT check that the caller is allocated/admin for the project (while the main POST /api/status-updates endpoint does). Low-risk because any authed user with admin role can invoke, but worth aligning.
seed_data_creation: All TEST_ prefixed risks created during tests are cleaned up via DELETE /api/risks/{id} in test teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Risk/Issue register fully functional: CRUD, quick-status change dropdown on row, edit dialog, delete. Status update flow: slider removed, inline risks section live. Blockers auto-promote to Issues with dedup. AI actions add_risk/update_risk/create_status_update all working. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration16.py — reuse for regression. Test project: 698c7799eea263b28c2715b3 (ASKDD Chatbot).
